items.memory: In the beginning, was built by a mage who sought solitude above the clouds Shortly after, a new site was founded nearby: Kulmokhall. This was the start of its story.  Structure and hierarchy shaped every aspect of life.  The tower remained a beacon.
items.reflection: The tower pierces the sky — a bridge between earth and the beyond.

items.memory: In the 50s (The Frost Era, year 51), the site felt worn and tired. During this time, a new wing was built at the base to house students and visitors It was a decade that broke its spirit.  The land was measured and accounted for.  The tower pierced the sky, a finger of stone pointing at fate.
items.reflection: The tower stands alone, but it watches over everything.

items.memory: In the 66s (Age of Ashen, year 5), the site felt sharp and dangerous. During this time, the tower was besieged by those who feared its power — it held That decade taught Turdurnaz that hope endures. Thrakkragvorn was active during this time.  Every stone had its place and every soul its duty.  The tower's light never faltered — a promise kept.
items.reflection: From the peak, one can see the shape of the world.

items.memory: In the 81s (Age of Ashen, year 20), the site felt worn and tired. The site grew — a secondary tower was raised nearby to house additional works It was a decade that shaped the site. Zolbal was active during this time.  The law held firm through the seasons.  The tower was a sentinel against the darkness.
items.reflection: Height brings perspective — from the top, the world looks different.

items.memory: The 97s (Age of Ashen, year 36) was a hard decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, the tower's library was expanded with tomes from distant lands That decade taught Turdurnaz that hope endures.  The machinery of society ran without pause.  The tower stood tall against the sky.
items.reflection: Height brings perspective — from the top, the world looks different.

items.memory: The 112s (Age of Ashen, year 51) was a hard decade for Turdurnaz. The site grew — the tower was connected to a network of similar spires across the realm It was a decade that tested its limits.  Rules governed all — and all obeyed.  The tower watched over the land, unchanging and patient.
items.reflection: The tower pierces the sky — a bridge between earth and the beyond.

items.memory: The 128s (The Golden Times, year 5) was a dark decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, a hidden chamber was discovered deep beneath the tower The silences of that time linger still.  Order and discipline prevailed.  The tower stood alone, proud and unyielding.
items.reflection: The tower pierces the sky — a bridge between earth and the beyond.

items.memory: The 143s (The Golden Times, year 20) was a prosperous decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, the tower was wreathed in strange mists that lasted a full season It was a decade that made it what it is. Vorngum was active during this time.  Precision and control defined those years.  The tower's peak scraped the clouds — a symbol of vigilance.
items.reflection: The tower pierces the sky — a bridge between earth and the beyond.

items.memory: In the 159s (The Golden Times, year 36), the site felt sharp and dangerous. During this time, the tower became a sanctuary for refugees seeking protection That decade taught Turdurnaz that time changes everything.  Every stone had its place and every soul its duty.  The tower's peak scraped the clouds — a symbol of vigilance.
items.reflection: The spire holds secrets that only the heights can reveal.

items.memory: The 174s (The Golden Times, year 51) was a hard decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, the tower's top was struck by lightning — the damage was repaired with magic It was a decade that showed the truth. Ornbazrak was active during this time.  Rules governed all — and all obeyed.  The tower remained a beacon.
items.reflection: Height brings perspective — from the top, the world looks different.

items.memory: Looking back at the 190s (The Pearl Years, year 5), it stands out — the wind carried strange news. The most poignant moment was a megabeast called Doomdrake attacked, killing 94. It was a decade that shaped the site. Durmok was active during this time. The Blade of the Sky was held in the area.  Rules governed all — and all obeyed.  The tower pierced the sky, a finger of stone pointing at fate.
items.reflection: The tower stands alone, but it watches over everything.

items.memory: The 205s (The Pearl Years, year 20) was a turbulent decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, a new crystal was placed at the tower's peak to focus magical energies The faces of that time linger still. Gornnaz was active during this time. The Doomdrake terrorized the region.  Order and discipline prevailed.  The tower remained a beacon.
items.reflection: The spire holds secrets that only the heights can reveal.

items.memory: Looking back at the 221s (The Pearl Years, year 36), it stands out — everything felt fragile. The site grew — the outer wall was built to enclose the tower's grounds That decade taught Turdurnaz that kindness matters. Vguman was active during this time. The Doomdrake terrorized the region.  Rules governed all — and all obeyed.  The tower was a sentinel against the darkness.
items.reflection: From the peak, one can see the shape of the world.

items.memory: The 236s (The Pearl Years, year 51) was a turbulent decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, the tower's master vanished — the tower stood empty for a time The shadows of that time linger still.  The machinery of society ran without pause.  The tower's light never faltered — a promise kept.
items.reflection: Height brings perspective — from the top, the world looks different.

items.memory: The 252s (The Dawn Age, year 5) was a hard decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, a great experiment shook the tower — strange lights were seen for days That decade taught Turdurnaz that time changes everything. Ornbazrak was active during this time.  Structure and hierarchy shaped every aspect of life.  The tower was a sentinel against the darkness.
items.reflection: The tower pierces the sky — a bridge between earth and the beyond.

The tower watched over the land, unchanging and patient.

items.memory: Looking back at the 283s (The Dawn Age, year 36), it stands out — the harvest was bountiful. The site grew — the tower was raised higher — a new level was added to its height That decade taught Turdurnaz that a good plan saves lives. Grimrak was active during this time.  Rules governed all — and all obeyed.  The tower remained a beacon.
items.reflection: The spire holds secrets that only the heights can reveal.

items.memory: The 298s (The Dawn Age, year 51) was a quiet decade for Turdurnaz. The site grew — a gate was built at the tower's base to control access That decade taught Turdurnaz that hope endures. The Doomdrake terrorized the region.  Precision and control defined those years.  The tower was a sentinel against the darkness.
items.reflection: Power flows through the stone, channeled by those who built it.

items.memory: The 314s (The Crystal Epoch, year 5) was a forgotten decade for Turdurnaz. During this time, the tower was besieged by those who feared its power — it held That decade taught Turdurnaz that hope endures.  The law held firm through the seasons.  The tower pierced the sky, a finger of stone pointing at fate.
items.reflection: Height brings perspective — from the top, the world looks different.

items.memory: In the 329s (The Crystal Epoch, year 20), the site felt alive with possibility. During this time, a hidden chamber was discovered deep beneath the tower It was a decade that shaped the site.  The machinery of society ran without pause.  The tower stood tall against the sky.
items.reflection: The tower remembers every step taken up its winding stairs.

The tower's peak scraped the clouds — a symbol of vigilance.

items.memory: A stranger arrived at the site — they carried news from distant lands.
Traders brought goods from afar — the site's market was busy.
A tournament was held at the site.
Travelers passed through Turdurnaz and remarked on the site's condition.
Supplies were stored for the coming season.
A dispute was settled at the site.
The site's elder made a proclamation.
A nearby ruin was reported.
This season last year was the same — the site has endured since then.
I wonder what the coming year will bring to this place.
Considering Turdurnaz. This season feels precious — the site surrenders to it.
The future is uncertain. The runes record that the summer is for war.
Considering Turdurnaz. The spring light hangs over Turdurnaz — it makes the site feel melancholy.
Considering Turdurnaz. This spring, the site feels forgotten.
The site has been waiting more than usual this season.
There is a vision to forge a legacy.
The site aims to discover a lost artifact.
There are plans to expand the site — new walls, new quarters, new hope.
The site will host a ceremony next season.
We hope to make contact with a distant realm.
We dream of becoming a great power.
I am concerned about our neighbors — they are far and we cannot rely on them.
I worry about the plague spreading — too many have fallen sick.
I am concerned about our reputation — a lie is spreading about us.
I am concerned about a rival's schemes — they smile too much.
